item.title: John Allen’s Path to the Navy SEALs
item.description: A brief look at the journey that shaped John Allen into a Navy SEAL, reflecting on service, training, and commitment.

media:content.media:title: John Allen’s Path to the Navy SEALs
media:content.media:description: A brief look at the journey that shaped John Allen into a Navy SEAL, reflecting on service, training, and commitment.

item.title: Why U.S. Troops Rode Horses in Afghanistan
item.description: A look at why U.S. troops rode horses into battle in Afghanistan, drawing on firsthand military experience and the realities of the terrain.

media:content.media:title: Why U.S. Troops Rode Horses in Afghanistan
media:content.media:description: A look at why U.S. troops rode horses into battle in Afghanistan, drawing on firsthand military experience and the realities of the terrain.

item.title: Gary Sinise on Forrest Gump
item.description: Gary Sinise reflects on Forrest Gump and the film’s coming together, offering a thoughtful look at its place in American storytelling.

media:content.media:title: Gary Sinise on Forrest Gump
media:content.media:description: Gary Sinise reflects on Forrest Gump and the film’s coming together, offering a thoughtful look at its place in American storytelling.

item.title: How a Mirror Saved Lives in Combat
item.description: A veteran recounts how a mirror helped save lives in combat, offering a firsthand reflection on survival, quick thinking, and service.

media:content.media:title: How a Mirror Saved Lives in Combat
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts how a mirror helped save lives in combat, offering a firsthand reflection on survival, quick thinking, and service.

item.title: What Really Happened at Iwo Jima
item.description: A historical look at Iwo Jima, reflecting on the battle and the experiences of those who served there.

media:content.media:title: What Really Happened at Iwo Jima
media:content.media:description: A historical look at Iwo Jima, reflecting on the battle and the experiences of those who served there.

item.title: Slept With Rifles Between Their Legs
item.description: A veteran recalls the routine of sleeping with a rifle close at hand, reflecting the constant readiness and discipline of military life.

media:content.media:title: Slept With Rifles Between Their Legs
media:content.media:description: A veteran recalls the routine of sleeping with a rifle close at hand, reflecting the constant readiness and discipline of military life.

item.title: The Pacific in Real Life
item.description: A historical look at the real-life experiences behind The Pacific, reflecting on service, survival, and the human cost of war.

media:content.media:title: The Pacific in Real Life
media:content.media:description: A historical look at the real-life experiences behind The Pacific, reflecting on service, survival, and the human cost of war.

item.title: Dakota Meyer and the Battle of Ganjgal
item.description: Dakota Meyer drove into enemy fire during the Battle of Ganjgal in Afghanistan to rescue wounded teammates and recover the fallen, earning the Medal of Honor.

media:content.media:title: Dakota Meyer and the Battle of Ganjgal
media:content.media:description: Dakota Meyer drove into enemy fire during the Battle of Ganjgal in Afghanistan to rescue wounded teammates and recover the fallen, earning the Medal of Honor.

item.title: Why John Allen Chose the Navy SEAL Path
item.description: John Allen explains why he chose to become a Navy SEAL, sharing a personal reflection on service, training, and the path that led him there.

media:content.media:title: Why John Allen Chose the Navy SEAL Path
media:content.media:description: John Allen explains why he chose to become a Navy SEAL, sharing a personal reflection on service, training, and the path that led him there.
